Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer for unbound SD-JWT; Wallet collects and retrieves credential; Extract issuer DID from SD-JWT
Data:
- Credential type: unbound_example_sd_jwt
- Pre-authorized code
- Wallet API version: ID2
Expected Result: Issuer returns credential offer; Wallet successfully retrieves unbound SD-JWT; Issuer DID is extracted from credential

Action: Business Verifier creates a Trust Anchor linked to the trusted issuer DID and initiates verification request (parametrized for API v1 and v2)
Data:
- Trust Anchor with issuer DID
- trustRegistryUri: 'trust-reg.trust-infra.swiyu-int.admin.ch'
- API version: ID2 (standard) or V1 (withDCQL)
Expected Result: Verifier creates verification request with Trust Anchor configuration

Action: Wallet retrieves verification request details and submits the unbound SD-JWT presentation to the verifier
Data:
- Verification request deeplink
- Unbound SD-JWT credential
- Trust Anchor verification flow
- OID4VP endpoint
Expected Result: Wallet constructs and submits presentation; Verifier validates issuer through Trust Anchor

Action: Business Verifier confirms verification success and validates state
Data:
- Verification result from management API
- Verification ID
- PresentationDefinition
Expected Result: Verification state = SUCCESS; issuer trust is confirmed through Trust Anchor
